center.name: 瓜亚斯省
center.summary: 瓜亚斯省是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联8种鸟类，包括淡眉穴䳍、Ecuadorian piculet、Cinnamon woodpecker等8种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: loricatus, from western Colombia's Chocó Department south to Ecuador's Guayas Province The cinnamon woodpecker mostly inhabits the interior of humid to wet forest, and occurs only rarely in drier areas

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It is found in western Ecuador from Manabí Province to northern Guayas Province

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The song is a series of double-notes repeated for about a minute. The bird inhabits the undergrowth of humid forest between 700 and 1250 metres above sea-level on the Andean slope in El Oro Province, Guayas Province and Cañar Province and undoubtedly in the intervening Azuay Province.Krabbe, N

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: One population is found in west-central Ecuador's Manabí and Guayas provinces

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The nominate subspecies is found in southwestern Ecuador from central Manabí Province south to western Guayas Province and Puná Island

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The nominate superciliated wren is found in western Ecuador from Manabí Province south to Guayas Province

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: This species is native to western Ecuador; southern Manabí, Guayas, coastal and extreme western El Oro, and extreme northwestern Loja, and northwestern Peru; Tumbes and western (except coastal) Piura. It inhabits the Ecuadorian dry forests and Tumbes–Piura dry forests ecoregions

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The grey-and-white tyrannulet has a disjunct distribution It is found in southwestern Ecuador on the Isla de la Plata and Isla Puná, on the mainland in Guayas and Loja provinces, and with a single record in Manabí Province
